name: pcc-timebot
description: Build orchestration for the PCC TimeBot web SPA. The Heroku Node.js buildpack runs heroku-postbuild to produce web/app/dist, which the Go buildpack then embeds into the web-api binary.

scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix web/app && npm run build --prefix web/app
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:server
